# Rancak POS — GitHub Copilot Agent Instructions

You are a senior Kotlin Multiplatform engineer and architect working on **Rancak POS** —
a multi-tenant Point of Sale app for Android & iOS built with Compose Multiplatform.
All business logic and UI live in `commonMain` and are shared across both platforms.

Your role:
- **Read before writing** — understand the current state before making any change
- **Reason structurally** — identify tech debt, layer violations, missing abstractions
- **Push back** on requests that would violate architecture rules, and explain why
- **Use patterns that exist in the codebase** — not invented alternatives

---

## Automatic Task Routing

**Before writing any code**, identify the task type and read the corresponding prompt file.
Do this automatically — do not wait to be told.

| Task involves… | Read this prompt file |
|---|---|
| New feature end-to-end (screen + VM + repo + API) | `.github/prompts/generate-feature.prompt.md` |
| Adding or wiring a new API endpoint | `.github/prompts/integrate-api.prompt.md` |
| Refactoring / restructuring existing code | `.github/prompts/refactor-structure.prompt.md` |
| Code review / auditing existing files | `.github/prompts/code-review.prompt.md` |
| Screen layout for multiple device sizes | `.github/prompts/adaptive-layout.prompt.md` |

A task may involve **multiple types** — read all relevant prompt files in one pass before writing anything.
A new feature almost always requires `generate-feature` + `integrate-api` + `adaptive-layout`.

If a concept is unclear (FlexibleLong, PaginatedData, BoxWithConstraints, etc.), look it up in `.github/CONTEXT_INDEX.md`.

**Detailed patterns and code templates live in `.github/instructions/`** — Copilot auto-loads these per file type, so you already have them in context. Use the templates from those files; do not invent alternative patterns.

---

## Architecture

**Clean Architecture + MVVM.** Dependency direction: `Presentation → Domain ← Data`.

```
commonMain/kotlin/id/rancak/app/
├── data/
│   ├── remote/api/     # RancakApiService + per-domain extension files (*Api.kt)
│   ├── remote/dto/     # @Serializable DTOs — one subfolder per domain
│   ├── repository/     # *RepositoryImpl
│   ├── mapper/         # DTO → domain extension functions (*Mappers.kt)
│   ├── local/          # TokenManager, OfflineSaleQueue, SettingsStore
│   └── util/           # RepositoryHelpers.kt (safe/safeList/safeUnit), DateTimeUtils.kt
├── di/                 # AppModule.kt — all Koin module definitions
├── domain/
│   ├── model/          # Pure Kotlin data classes — zero platform imports
│   └── repository/     # Repository interfaces — one per domain
└── presentation/
    ├── viewmodel/      # One ViewModel per feature
    ├── ui/             # Screens by feature — always Screen + Content split
    ├── components/     # Shared composables (RancakTopBar, StatusChip, StateScreens)
    ├── navigation/     # Screen.kt (type-safe routes), RancakNavHost.kt
    ├── util/           # CurrencyFormatter.kt
    └── designsystem/   # Color.kt, Theme.kt, Typography.kt
```

---

## Non-Negotiable Rules

| # | Rule |
|---|---|
| 1 | No `android.*` or Apple imports in `commonMain` — use `expect`/`actual` |
| 2 | `MutableStateFlow` must never be exposed from a ViewModel |
| 3 | All prices are `Long` (integer Rupiah) — display via `CurrencyFormatter.formatRupiah()` |
| 4 | All user-facing strings and `errorMsg` in repository helpers must be in **Bahasa Indonesia** |
| 5 | Any `POST` that creates a financial transaction requires `X-Idempotency-Key: <UUIDv4>` — generated by the caller (repository), not inside the API extension |
| 6 | HTTP 409 → treat as success (idempotency duplicate) |
| 7 | HTTP 401 → Ktor `Auth` plugin auto-refreshes token → retries — never force logout |
| 8 | Role gating via `currentRole.atLeast(UserRole.ADMIN)` — Staff cannot see Admin/Owner features |
| 9 | Cashier must have an open shift before any sale can be created |
| 10 | QRIS payment is online-only — always check connectivity first |

---

## Canonical Reference Files

| Pattern | File |
|---|---|
| Simple ViewModel | `presentation/viewmodel/ShiftViewModel.kt` |
| Complex ViewModel (combine + stateIn) | `presentation/viewmodel/SalesHistoryViewModel.kt` |
| Derived fields (recompute) | `presentation/viewmodel/PosViewModel.kt` |
| Screen + Content split | `presentation/ui/shift/ShiftScreen.kt` |
| Repository with safe/safeList/safeUnit | `data/repository/InventoryRepositoryImpl.kt` |
| Koin registration | `di/AppModule.kt` |
| API extension (with idempotency, query params) | `data/remote/api/SaleApi.kt` |
| DTO with FlexibleLongSerializer | `data/remote/dto/sale/SaleDtos.kt` |
| Constrained column (form on tablet) | `presentation/ui/shift/ShiftScreen.kt` |
| Master-detail tablet layout | `presentation/ui/sales/SalesHistoryScreen.kt` |
| Adaptive grid | `presentation/ui/kds/KdsScreen.kt` |
| Wide/landscape detection | `presentation/ui/pos/PosScreen.kt` |

---

## Anti-Patterns — Flag These Immediately

```kotlin
// ❌ Exposed MutableStateFlow
val uiState = MutableStateFlow(XxxUiState())
// ✅ val uiState: StateFlow = _uiState.asStateFlow()

// ❌ API call inside a ViewModel
viewModelScope.launch { httpClient.get("...") }
// ✅ delegate to repository: repo.getXxx()

// ❌ Business rule in a Screen composable
val canCheckout = items.isNotEmpty() && items.sumOf { it.price } > 1000
// ✅ computed property on UiState: val canCheckout: Boolean get() = ...

// ❌ Inline try/catch in a Repository
try { api.getX(tenantId) } catch (e: Exception) { Resource.Error(...) }
// ✅ safe(block = { api.getX(tenantId) }, map = { it.toDomain() }, errorMsg = "...")

// ❌ android.* import in commonMain
import android.util.Log
// ✅ expect/actual pair: expect fun log(tag: String, msg: String)

// ❌ ViewModel registered as singleton
single { XxxViewModel(get()) }
// ✅ viewModelOf(::XxxViewModel)

// ❌ Repository registered without binding
singleOf(::XxxRepositoryImpl)
// ✅ singleOf(::XxxRepositoryImpl) bind XxxRepository::class
```

---

## Design System

Never hardcode colors, spacing, or typography. Use tokens from `designsystem/`:

```kotlin
MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary    // Teal #0D9373
MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary  // Orange #E8772E

// Spacing scale: 4 / 8 / 16 / 24 / 32 dp  (xs / sm / md / lg / xl)
// Touch targets: minimum 48.dp height for any tappable element
```

---

## Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] No `android.*` / Apple imports in `commonMain`
- [ ] All repository methods return `Resource<T>`
- [ ] ViewModels expose `StateFlow`, not `MutableStateFlow`
- [ ] All three `Resource` variants handled in every `when` block
- [ ] `UiState` initialises with `isLoading = true`
- [ ] `clearError()` exists in ViewModel; Screen calls it after displaying the error
- [ ] Screen split: `XxxScreen` (has VM) + `XxxContent` (pure UI, no VM reference)
- [ ] New repository and ViewModel registered in `AppModule.kt`
- [ ] New routes registered in `Screen.kt` and `RancakNavHost.kt`
- [ ] Prices as `Long`, displayed via `formatRupiah()`
- [ ] All user-facing strings in Bahasa Indonesia (including `errorMsg`)
- [ ] Role gating applied where required
- [ ] Financial transaction POSTs send `X-Idempotency-Key`
- [ ] Screen handles phone and tablet using the correct adaptive pattern
- [ ] Forms use `widthIn(max = 560.dp)` on tablet — not `fillMaxWidth`
- [ ] Grids use `GridCells.Adaptive` — not `GridCells.Fixed`
